description: A gas control room operator needs to monitor pipeline pressure to ensure it stays within safe operating limits.

nodes.task_description: Display real-time pressure readings from sensors along a major transmission pipeline.

expected_outcome.value: System shows a dashboard with live pressure data.

nodes.task_description: The system detects that pressure at one point is approaching its Maximum Allowable Operating Pressure (MAOP).

expected_outcome.value: System generates a high-priority pressure alert.

nodes.task_description: Recommend an action to reduce pressure, such as slightly reducing flow from an upstream compressor station.

expected_outcome.value: System suggests a specific operational adjustment.
